title: Create login & logout function for a Profile Page

content.problemStatement:
In this practice problem you have to create a login and logout functionality for a Profile page.
The user should be able to login with a valid username & password. On successful login, they should be able to open the profile link and also should be able to logout.

The following are created for you: \
Project: `myproject` , App: `myapp` \
Templates:
- `base.html` - the parent template
- `home.html` - to serve as the hompage
- `login.html` - a dedicated login page
- `profile.html` - a profile page that will be accessible only by logged in users.
- `register_placeholder.html` - Just a placeholder for the registration function.

URL mappings also are done.

### Task:
In the `views.py` file complete the login and logout view functions:
### 1. login_view(request)
This view should:
- Display a login form when the page is accessed with a GET request.
- Process the submitted login form when accessed with a POST request.
- Use Django’s built-in AuthenticationForm.
- If the form is valid:
   - Log the user in using Django's login() function.
   - Redirect the user to the homepage (use redirect('home')).
- If the form is invalid, re-render the form with error messages.
### 2. logout_view(request)
This view should:
- Log the user out using Django’s logout() function.
- Redirect the user back to the homepage using redirect('home').

After completing the above, click on **RUN** which will create a user with the following credentials and run the server: \
Username: `chef` \
Password: `chefpass@123` \
When the homepage loads on the browser: 
- **EXPAND/OPEN** browser on a new tab. 
- Login with the creds as given above. 
- You should be able to see and click on the Profile Link. 
- Also you should be able to Logout.
